Module com.example.battleship
Package com.example.battleship.view.ships

Class AircraftCarrier3D

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.Group
com.example.battleship.view.ships.Ship3D
com.example.battleship.view.ships.AircraftCarrier3D
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class AircraftCarrier3D extends Ship3D
Aircraft carrier: the largest ship in the fleet, occupies 4 cells.

Built the same "printed layer by layer" way as the destroyer and submarine, but with a different taper curve: instead of growing (or growing then shrinking) over the whole length, the beam rises sharply from a point at the bow and then plateaus at full width for almost the entire hull -- the flat-sided profile of a real carrier, with the flight deck layer overhanging past the hull below it. On top of that deck it carries an off-center island (bridge, funnel, radar mast), two elevators, catapult stripes near the bow, and small deck-edge gun tubs, all glued to the deck's real surface.

    private double

    Same beam formula, looked up by X position -- used to glue deck details to the real surface.

    beamAtIndex(int index, double maxBeam, double minBeam)
     
    private double
    beamFactor(double t)
    Beam ramps from minBeam up to maxBeam over the first PLATEAU_FRACTION of the length, then stays flat -- a sharp bow point followed by parallel sides.
    private void
    buildCatapultStripes(javafx.scene.Group group, double bowTipX)
    Two pale catapult stripes painted on the deck near the bow.
    private void
    buildElevators(javafx.scene.Group group, double hullLength, double bowTipX, double islandX)
    Two aircraft elevators: dark flat patches set into the deck on the side opposite the island.
    private void
    buildGunTubs(javafx.scene.Group group, double hullLength, double bowTipX, double sternTipX)
    Small deck-edge anti-aircraft gun tubs near the bow and stern corners, glued to the deck's real edge.
    protected javafx.scene.Group
    buildHull()
    Builds the ship's entire hull as one continuous group of Shape3D nodes (Box, Cylinder, Sphere), spanning its full length.
    private double
    buildIsland(javafx.scene.Group group, double hullLength, double bowTipX)
    Off-center island (bridge, funnel, radar mast, flag), set aft of center toward starboard.
    private void
    buildSternFlagstaff(javafx.scene.Group group, double sternTipX)
    Thin flagstaff near the stern, with a small flag.

  • Constructor Details

    • AircraftCarrier3D

      public AircraftCarrier3D(int row, int column, Orientation orientation)
      Parameters:
      row - board row of this ship's anchor cell (its bow)
      column - board column of this ship's anchor cell
      orientation - whether this ship extends along rows or columns from its anchor cell

  • Method Details

    • buildHull

      protected javafx.scene.Group buildHull()
      Builds the ship's entire hull as one continuous group of Shape3D nodes (Box, Cylinder, Sphere), spanning its full length. Use Ship3D.cellCenterX(int) to place distinctive features (a bridge, a periscope, an island...) at a specific cell, and Ship3D.shipCenterX() to center pieces that span the whole ship.
      Specified by:
      buildHull in class Ship3D
      Returns:
      group representing the complete hull

    • beamFactor

      private double beamFactor(double t)
      Beam ramps from minBeam up to maxBeam over the first PLATEAU_FRACTION of the length, then stays flat -- a sharp bow point followed by parallel sides.

    • beamAtIndex

      private double beamAtIndex(int index, double maxBeam, double minBeam)
      Returns:
      the beam (width) of hull slice number index out of 8, per beamFactor(double)

    • beamAt

      private double beamAt(double x, double hullLength, double bowTipX, double maxBeam, double minBeam)
      Same beam formula, looked up by X position -- used to glue deck details to the real surface.

    • buildTaperedLayer

      private void buildTaperedLayer(javafx.scene.Group group, double centerY, double layerHeight, double maxBeam, double minBeam, javafx.scene.paint.Color color, double hullLength, double bowTipX)
      Builds one full hull layer as 8 adjacent Box slices, each sized by beamAtIndex(int, double, double).

    • deckTopY

      private static double deckTopY()
      Returns:
      the Y coordinate of the flight deck's top surface, used to sit every deck detail flush on it

    • buildIsland

      private double buildIsland(javafx.scene.Group group, double hullLength, double bowTipX)
      Off-center island (bridge, funnel, radar mast, flag), set aft of center toward starboard.

    • buildElevators

      private void buildElevators(javafx.scene.Group group, double hullLength, double bowTipX, double islandX)
      Two aircraft elevators: dark flat patches set into the deck on the side opposite the island.

    • buildCatapultStripes

      private void buildCatapultStripes(javafx.scene.Group group, double bowTipX)
      Two pale catapult stripes painted on the deck near the bow.

    • buildGunTubs

      private void buildGunTubs(javafx.scene.Group group, double hullLength, double bowTipX, double sternTipX)
      Small deck-edge anti-aircraft gun tubs near the bow and stern corners, glued to the deck's real edge.

    • buildSternFlagstaff

      private void buildSternFlagstaff(javafx.scene.Group group, double sternTipX)
      Thin flagstaff near the stern, with a small flag.
